//: Two SMT-LIB FSMs coordinated through the existing world plumbing.
//2: clock (writer) increments world.tick and prints 'tick'; watcher
//3: (reader) wakes on the world.tick delta and Exits at 3. Mirror of

fsms.smtlib:
(declare-const n Int)
(declare-const _n Int)
(declare-const is_first_tick Bool)
(declare-const world_next.tick Int)
(assert (= n (ite is_first_tick 1 (+ _n 1))))
(assert (= world_next.tick n))

(declare-const world.tick Int)
(declare-const done Bool)
(declare-const not_done Bool)
(assert (= done (>= world.tick 3)))
(assert (= not_done (not done)))
